summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of VASTRAM e-commerce platform. All major functionality working correctly including homepage, navigation, shop page, product details, user authentication, cart, wishlist, checkout flow, admin dashboard, and search.
passed_tests: Homepage loads with hero section, categories, featured products, new arrivals, bestsellers
Navigation menu works with Men/Women/Kids dropdowns
Shop page loads with products and filters (category, price, size)
Product detail page shows product info, size/color selection, add to cart
User registration and login works correctly
Add to cart functionality (requires login as expected)
Cart page shows items with quantity controls
Checkout flow with shipping info and payment selection
Admin login works (admin@vastram.com / admin123)
Admin dashboard shows stats and navigation
Admin can view and manage products list
Admin can view orders list
Wishlist functionality works
Search functionality works correctly
Dark mode toggle is present and functional
Mobile responsiveness works
All 34 backend API endpoints working (100% success rate)
Authentication flow (registration, login, profile)
Product management (CRUD, filtering, search)
Cart operations (add, update, remove)
Order creation and management
Coupon validation
Admin endpoints (dashboard, products, orders, customers, coupons)
